sections.paragraph:
Original: בּת

Transliteration: bath

Phonetic: bath

BDB Definition:

  1. bath, a unit of liquid measure, about 40 litres, equal to dry measure ephah
  2. (TWOT) a liquid measure, about 22 litres

Origin: corresponding to H1324

TWOT entry: 2644

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
